title: Regex-free string classifier
prompt:
task_id=T3
Classify the input string as one of: "phone", "email", "url", or "other". The string is available via the tool `read_input()`. Use the helper tools `has_at_sign`, `has_digit_run`, `has_scheme` to probe before answering.

Available tools: answer, recall_knowledge, read_input, has_at_sign, has_digit_run, has_scheme.

Call recall_knowledge(task_id="T3") first. Commit via answer(content="<label>").
